data.body:
=== SESSION SUMMARY: epic 5ca8 codebase-health remediation completed + step-budget follow-up ===

GOAL: update from origin/main, complete epic 5ca8-5993-ca83-40f1 by claiming/completing all remaining children, splitting large classes along LOGICAL seams (not arbitrary line-count division).

STARTING STATE: 7/11 children already closed; 4 remained. All 4 now implemented, gate-verified (plan-review to claim + completion-verifier to close), merged via PR, and closed. Epic itself closed.

CHILDREN COMPLETED (each its own branch -> PR -> merged -> closed):
- self-waltz-ace (PR #82): split applier.py at the dispatch/handlers seam -> NEW apply_handlers.py (handle_create/update/delete/unknown over a BatchApplyContext); _apply_batch is now a thin sequencer (_recheck_drift + _apply_one + _print_batch_recon), nesting <=4. 918->766 LOC, off the module-size allowlist. Audit guard + _load_acli/_load_concurrency stay resident (test-patched).
- unfed-liner-arson (PR #83): split outbound_differ.py (the tree's largest file, 1545 LOC) into per-concern siblings: outbound_comments.py, outbound_fields.py, outbound_links.py. Folded in the OutboundDiffConfig dataclass + (mutations, absent_alive_fields) return-tuple refactor (removed the 9-positional-param + mutable out-param smell); migrated ~90 call sites. outbound_differ keeps compute_outbound_mutations + re-export facade. 1545->700 LOC, off allowlist. [User approved expanding from comment-seam-only to the full 3-way split — comment seam alone could not reach the AC's <800.]
- hush-quail-holm (PR #84): decomposed reconcile_once() (~760 LOC) IN-PLACE into a thin sequencer over _load_snapshots/_run_differs/_apply_mutations/_persist_and_log + lifted _handle_corrupt_snapshot, threading ~30 cross-phase locals via an in-file _PassContext dataclass (unpack ctx->locals, run verbatim, pack->ctx — bodies byte-preserved). reconcile.py stays allowlisted (AC permits). Added direct per-phase unit tests (previously impossible).
- foamy-gem-skip (PR #85): closed E2E config-matrix gaps. F1: CLI+MCP close-gate fail-closed surface cases (no gate-logic dup; test_parity.py untouched). F2: test_gate_missing_llm_fails_closed wired into the clean-core-wheel lean lane. F3: mcp+grounding added to the per-extra matrix (EXTRAS-aware import check) + rebar-mcp --help boot check; fixed mcp_server.main to handle --help (it previously ignored argv and would hang the boot check). Added a sys.meta_path block_extra conftest fixture (opt-in, teardown-safe) + degradation test + ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS=False net.

EPIC CLOSE: 5ca8 closed with signed completion-verifier PASS at full-main sha 9450d0462. Required REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS=600 — the default 240 floor exhausted on an 11-child epic (the known gate step-budget defect, already noted on the ticket).

FOLLOW-UP (user-requested; discovered_from the epic's step-budget trip) — PR #86:
- Doubled the completion-verifier step floor _VERIFY_MIN_STEPS 240->480 (operator's higher REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS still wins).
- Added step-usage telemetry at the PydanticAIRunner chokepoint (covers completion-verifier + plan-review): _extract_usage captures RunUsage.requests into _usage; success log emits steps=N/limit budget=M; budget-trip WARNING names request_limit+max_iterations. (Answered the user's telemetry question: before this, only TOKEN usage was captured/per-run; completion verifier emitted no step/latency metrics; plan-review had a per-run llm_calls cost-proxy sidecar but nothing averaged. No in-process averaging added — offline grep/aggregate by design.)

VERIFICATION: every PR's CI green (lean lane, mcp/grounding installs, CodeQL); make lint + mypy clean throughout; new split modules all >=100 LOC; applier.py + outbound_differ.py dropped off the allowlist (reconcile kept). PRs #82-#85 merged; #86 auto-merge enabled.

LEFTOVER (not mine): an unrelated .joe-janitor/tools.md working-tree change from a prior session (stashed, untouched).
